workLog.action: Confirmed root cause: merge_pr.py fetched mergeable/mergeStateStatus but only checked state (MERGED/CLOSED), so it merged on mergeable=UNKNOWN. Wrote failing test TestUnknownMergeStateRejection.
workLog.evidence: RED: pytest reported 'DID NOT RAISE SystemExit'; envelope showed state MERGED on mergeable=UNKNOWN.

workLog.action: Added _reject_unknown_merge_state() gated on not args.auto (exit 3, ApiError), mirrored test_pr_merge_ready.py 'Merge status is being calculated'. Applied identical change to copilot-cli mirror.
workLog.evidence: GREEN: uv run pytest tests/test_merge_pr.py -> 45 passed in 0.22s. Mutation (UNKNOWN -> MUTANT) made the 2 reject tests fail (DID NOT RAISE SystemExit); restoring -> 45 passed. ruff: All checks passed.
